title: Beyond Netherite Progression
description: Don't think netherite is strong enough? want to go further and become stronger? now you can with this mod. level up your your items with acienit to turn your netherite items into acienitium items. with this you will be able to live longer against mobs.
body: Don't think netherite is strong enough? want to go further and become stronger? now you can with this mod. level up your your items with acienit to turn your netherite items into acienitium items. with this you will be able to live longer against mobs. this mod uses the smithing table to progress. all items are 1.3 times stronger than netherite items. the ore can either be obtained via mining below y level zero or by combining dust made from killing the acienite golem then turned into nuggets which then turn into ingots.
